title: rubus durus
intro: Rubus durus, also known as the Wild Raspberry or Thorny Raspberry, is a type of plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Rubus durus lie in its berries, leaves, and roots, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus durus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Rubus durus typically involve making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its berries, leaves, and roots, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
